name: Kenorland Minerals Ltd.
summary: Kenorland Minerals Ltd. engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral properties in North America. The company holds three projects where work is being completed under an earn-in agreement from third parties that include the Frotet and Chicobi projects, which are both located in Quebec, Canada, as well as option to acquire interest in the Chebistuan Project, located in Quebec. It also owns 100% of the advanced stage Tanacross porphyry Cu-Au project, as well as an option to earn up to 70% in the Healy Project, both located in Alaska, the United States. Kenorland Minerals Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
